title: artifact_draft envelope
description: Envelope for a draft application artifact (CV/cover-letter/interview-prep) emitted by gmj-artifact-composer. Pins kind via const and reuses the shared agent_result_v1 base. Draft content carries a provenance-tagged claims array discriminated by artifact_type.

claim.description: A single provenance-tagged content claim. source_span is a dotted/indexed candidate.yaml path (COMPOSE-03). Self-contained: additionalProperties:false is scoped to this object ONLY.

artifact_content.description: Fielded (non-prose) draft body. artifact_type discriminates the draft variant; language carries the offer's single target language (COMPOSE-05). Self-contained: additionalProperties:false is scoped to this object ONLY, never the allOf envelope.
